reserve_access.description: A keycard, invite, bribes or insider access to a particular location.
reserve_access.name: Access
reserve_accuracy.description: Training or enhancement that provides +1 ACCURACY to a particular mech skill or action for the duration of this mission.
reserve_accuracy.name: Accuracy
reserve_ambush.description: Intel that allows you to choose exactly where your next battle will take place, including the layout of terrain and cover.
reserve_ambush.name: Ambush
reserve_ammo.description: Extra uses (+1 or +2) of a LIMITED weapon or system.
reserve_ammo.name: Ammo
reserve_backing.description: Useful leverage through political support from a powerful figure.
reserve_backing.name: Backing
reserve_blackmail.description: Blackmail materials or sensitive information concerning a particular person.
reserve_blackmail.name: Blackmail
reserve_bombardment.description: The ability to call in artillery or orbital bombardment once during mech combat (full action, RANGE 30 within line of sight, BLAST 2, 3d6 explosive damage).
reserve_bombardment.name: Bombardment
reserve_boosted_servos.name: Boosted servos
reserve_core_battery.description: An extra battery that allows a second use of a mech’s CORE SYSTEM.
reserve_core_battery.name: CORE battery
reserve_corebonus.name: Extra CORE Bonus
reserve_deployable_shield.description: A single-use deployable shield generator – a SIZE 1 deployable that grants soft cover to all friendly characters in a BURST 2 radius.
reserve_deployable_shield.name: Deployable Shield
reserve_disguise.description: An effective disguise or cover identity, allowing uncontested access to a location.
reserve_disguise.name: Disguise
reserve_diversion.description: A distraction that provides time to take action without fear of consequence.
reserve_diversion.name: Diversion
reserve_environmental_shielding.descript: Equipment that allows you to ignore a particular battlefield hazard or dangerous terrain, such as extreme heat or cold.
reserve_environmental_shielding.name: Environmental shielding
reserve_extended_harness.description: A custom harness that allows you to carry an extra pilot weapon and two extra pieces of pilot gear for the duration of this mission.
reserve_extended_harness.name: Extended Harness
reserve_extra_repairs.description: Supplies that give a mech +2 REPAIR CAP.
reserve_extra_repairs.name: Extra repairs
reserve_jump_jets.description: During this mission your mech can FLY when moving, but must end movement on land.
reserve_jump_jets.name: Jump jets
reserve_knowledge.description: An understanding of local history, customs, culture, or etiquette.
reserve_knowledge.name: Knowledge
reserve_license.description: Add a License Point to advance or unlock a new License.
reserve_license.name: License Point
reserve_mechskill.description: Add a Mech Skill Point to add to your Pilot's HULL, AGILITY, SYSTEMS, or ENGINEERING rating.
reserve_mechskill.name: Mech Skill Point
reserve_nhp_assistant.description: A non-human person (NHP) – an advanced artificial intelligence – controlled by the GM, that can give you advice on the current situation.
reserve_nhp_assistant.name: NHP Assistant
reserve_orbital_drop.description: The ability to start the mission by dropping from orbit into a heavily fortified or hard to reach location.
reserve_orbital_drop.name: Orbital Drop
reserve_redundant_repair.description: The ability to STABILIZE as a free action once per mission.
reserve_redundant_repair.name: Redundant repair
reserve_reinforcements.description: The ability to call in a friendly NPC mech of any Tier, once per mission.
reserve_reinforcements.name: Reinforcements
reserve_rented_gear.description: Temporary access to a new weapon or piece of mech gear.
reserve_rented_gear.name: Rented gear
reserve_reputation.description: A good name in the mission area, prompting good first impressions with the locals.
reserve_reputation.name: Reputation
reserve_safe_harbor.description: Guaranteed safety for meeting, planning, or recuperating.
reserve_safe_harbor.name: Safe Harbor
reserve_scouting.description: Detailed information on the kinds of mechs and threats you will face on the mission, such as number, type, and statistics.
reserve_scouting.name: Scouting
reserve_skill.description: Add a Skill Point to gain or improve a skill, typically as part of the "Get Focused" Downtime Action.
reserve_skill.name: Skill Point
reserve_smart_ammo.description: All weapons of your choice can be fired as if they are SMART.
reserve_smart_ammo.name: Smart ammo
reserve_sp.description: Add a System Point to your active mech's Max SP value
reserve_sp.name: System Point
reserve_supplies.description: Gear allowing easy crossing of a hazardous or hostile area.
reserve_supplies.name: Supplies
reserve_systems_reinforcement_hull.name: Systems reinforcement (HULL)
reserve_systems_reinforcement.descriptio: +1 ACCURACY to skill checks made with one skill – HULL, AGILITY, SYSTEMS or ENGINEERING.
reserve_systems_reinforcement.name: Systems reinforcement
reserve_talent.description: Add a Talent Point to gain or improve a Pilot Talent.
reserve_talent.name: Talent Point
reserve_tracking.description: Details on the location of important objects or people.
reserve_tracking.name: Tracking
reserve_vehicle.description: Use of a transport vehicle or starship (e.g. a TIER 1 NPC with the VEHICLE or SHIP template.)
reserve_vehicle.name: Vehicle
